metadata.description: AI-powered plugins for Claude Code and Claude Cowork. Marketing automation, content production, analytics, and more.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: Plan, execute, and measure digital marketing across all channels. 25 specialist agents, 7 commands, 141 skills, 14 HTTP connectors, connector discovery and onboarding. v2.6 adds 6 SEO sub-skills, expanded schema markup (18 types with deprecation tracking), Google SEO quick reference, and DataForSEO integration.

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 7 commands, 19 skills, 10 industry knowledge packs, and zero hallucinations. v3.6 adds optional AI image generation (feature images, contextual illustrations, social graphics) via fal.ai/Replicate with human-in-the-loop approval, SubagentStart brand injection hook, Stop quality gate hook, effort frontmatter on all skills.
